parameters.query: SELECT s.id, s.sede, s.display_name, s.direccion, s.maps_url, s.calendar_id, s.timezone, s.horario_json, s.calendarios_bloqueo, (SELECT calendar_id FROM sedes WHERE sede != $1 LIMIT 1) as otra_sede_calendar_id FROM sedes s WHERE s.sede = $1 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.consulta_id FROM consultas c JOIN pacientes p ON c.paciente_id = p.id WHERE p.telefono = $1 AND c.estado_cita NOT IN ('Cancelada','No Asistió') AND c.fecha_hora_inicio < $3::timestamptz AND c.fecha_hora_fin > $2::timestamptz LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO pacientes (telefono, nombre, email, origen_lead, lead_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, 'WhatsApp', (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE telefono_normalizado = normalizar_telefono($1) LIMIT 1)) ON CONFLICT (telefono) DO UPDATE SET nombre = CASE WHEN $2 != 'Paciente' THEN $2 ELSE pacientes.nombre END, lead_id = COALESCE(pacientes.lead_id, (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE telefono_normalizado = normalizar_telefono($1) LIMIT 1)), updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, telefono, nombre, lead_id

WITH ins AS (
  INSERT INTO consultas (consulta_id, paciente_id, sede_id, lead_id, fecha_hora_inicio, fecha_hora_fin, estado_cita, calendar_event_id, calendar_link, motivo_consulta, tipo_cita, origen)
  VALUES ($1, $2::uuid, $3::uuid, NULLIF($4,'null')::uuid, $5::timestamptz, $6::timestamptz, 'Programada', $7, $8, $9, $10, 'urobot')
  ON CONFLICT (consulta_id) DO UPDATE SET
    calendar_event_id = EXCLUDED.calendar_event_id,
    calendar_link = EXCLUDED.calendar_link,
    lead_id = COALESCE(consultas.lead_id, EXCLUDED.lead_id),
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING id, consulta_id, lead_id
),
transition AS (
  SELECT transition_lead_estado(ins.lead_id, 'cita_agendada', 'bot', 'agendar_cita') as result
  FROM ins WHERE ins.lead_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT ins.*, transition.result as lead_transition FROM ins LEFT JOIN transition ON true
